summary.within_1km: Only 2 schools found — area is primarily residential/commercial with limited educational infrastructure within immediate walking distance.
summary.within_2km: Expanded search reveals multiple additional schools, making the broader Nob Hill / Northwest District well-served for education.
summary.childcare: Several childcare/preschool options within 1.5km address early education needs.
summary.notes: Most schools in the area are K-8 or middle schools. High school students typically attend schools in the Northwest or downtown Portland area.

school_district.name: Portland Public Schools
school_district.notes: Portland Public Schools serves the Nob Hill / Northwest District area. Several highly-rated schools within 2km.

strengths: Two middle schools within 1km for middle school families
limitations: No elementary school within 1km (nearest: Chapman at 1.2km)
No high school within 1km (nearest: Willamette at 1.5km)

notable_school_landmarks.name: Vaux's Swifts at Chapman Elementary
notable_school_landmarks.description: Every September, Vaux's Swifts migrate through Portland and roost in the Chapman Elementary chimney. This is a notable community natural phenomenon near the neighborhood.
notable_school_landmarks.location: Chapman Elementary School, 800 NW Nicholas St
